articles.title: Fable is coming back: Federal government lifts export controls on Anthropic AI model
articles.summary: The US Commerce Department is lifting export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, clearing the way for Fable's return after a two-week suspension. Anthropic agreed to work with the US government on safety protocols and standards for Mythos, Fable, and future model releases.

articles.title: AWS launches $1B forward-deployed engineering org
articles.summary: AWS launched a new AI-focused forward-deployed engineering group to embed with customer teams and help ship production agents. The move follows similar enterprise AI deployment pushes from OpenAI and Anthropic.

articles.title: Microsoft launches MAI-Code-1-Flash on GitHub Copilot
articles.summary: Microsoft has launched MAI-Code-1-Flash, its proprietary AI coding model, to general availability for GitHub Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise subscribers. Admins must enable the relevant policy in Copilot settings. The model is designed for fast, low-latency code generation and agentic workflows, with usage-based billing aligned to Copilot pricing.

articles.title: AWS Forward Deployed Engineering
articles.summary: AWS is putting $1B behind a new Forward Deployed Engineering org that embeds AWS engineers directly with enterprise customers to build agentic AI workflows and move projects from pilots to production faster. Cloud vendors are shifting from “sell the platform” to “help build the outcome” because enterprises are getting stuck on integration, governance, and last-mile deployment.

articles.title: Ontology Everywhere!
articles.summary: Ontologies have returned to the spotlight with the rise of LLMs, providing formal, shared knowledge models that support machine reasoning through standards such as OWL and RDFS. Unlike traditional data models or ERDs, ontologies enable AI systems to infer new relationships and reason over business semantics, rather than simply traversing connected data.

articles.title: Conversational Analytics in BigQuery is now GA
articles.summary: Google Cloud made Conversational Analytics in BigQuery generally available, letting users query data, run analyses, and generate reports with natural language. The feature is built on Gemini and BigQuery's existing governance model.

articles.title: Microsoft builds a bouncer to keep bots out of Teams meetings
articles.summary: Microsoft has introduced a “bot bouncer” for Microsoft Teams meetings that places bots in a lobby where a human must validate the bot's ID, using behavioral and infrastructure signals to distinguish bots from humans. Microsoft also plans an ISV registration path so known third-party bots can self-identify. Rollout has begun, and Microsoft says it will retire the CAPTCHA-based approach once the new mechanism is in place.

articles.title: TotalSecure helps business adopt AI without the security handbrake
articles.summary: TotalSecure is a managed security service aimed at removing the “security handbrake” from corporate AI adoption. Its AI-focused counterpart, TotalSecure AI, integrates with Microsoft Purview DSPM and Sentinel/Defender XDR to provide continuous AI data security, policy enforcement as code, real-time risk monitoring, and regulator-ready metrics.

articles.title: Architecture as an executable constraint instead of documentation (GitHub Repo)
articles.summary: Guardian-framework is a tool that turns software architecture into executable constraints, continuously validating that implementations match architectural decisions during CI. It uses a single .pi/ directory as the architectural source of truth, generates enforcement artifacts (specs, ADRs, CI policies, and agent workflows), and blocks merges on architecture violations with validator scripts.

articles.title: PrivacyHawk Enterprise helps organizations find shadow IT and minimize third-party cyber risk
articles.summary: PrivacyHawk announced the general availability of PrivacyHawk Enterprise, a solution aimed at identifying and removing shadow IT accounts, canceled/abandoned SaaS subscriptions, and overlooked third-party services.

articles.title: Live on the first floor while building the second
articles.summary: AI finance transformation works best when CFOs and CIOs sequence data, process, controls, and tooling work into compounding phases that deliver ROI early instead of betting everything on a distant multi-year payoff.
